name: PARA♰BELLUM ~ 魔弹帕菈
publisher: 马家沟红旗农机合作社
short_description: Necromancer's army is gathering! But he can't afford Necronomicon Prime so his army can only use free medieval equipment set... We believe that one battle sister can solve them well. Go Forth, Sister Para, Blast your enemy in this survivor-like shooter game!
detailed_description:
In the beginning, The God created the world in six days, But not doing well. inflations, debt crises and inequality are literally everywhere.
　So He rushed to create the Revolver, to make the people equal at least in front of this thing, And it was so, But not for long.
　When the Revolver is not equal enough, He invested the Holy Church, Granting them all the Firearms, Dynamites and Service lines.
　Since then, Whenever the world suffer, He can just turn off the phone and pretend to be dead. Then the Fathers and Sisters of Holy Church had to shoulder the heavy burden of wiping his ass.
　"..Good news? Guns can be paid in installment and bullets reimbursed to you every week."
　--Father Colt, "Our Father in Couch: Trinity of Recoil, Blowback and Gas Operation" Part 8.

†About this Game†

Parabellum is a Survivor Shooter game. WE ALL KNOW WHAT "SURVIVOR" IS RIGHT?!
As the Battle Sister of Holy Church, Sweep out your enemies with Various guns and abilities!

  • Survive 15 minutes in the siege of thousand enemies.

  • Build character from random perks & items.. and curse the game when you got bad luck.

  • More than 12 basic guns with unique perks and upgrades.. Some of them are just weak anyway.

  • Meet the random bosses at the 5th, 10th and 15th minute.. Help them get a new life!

  • Reach the kill count record to unlock more start point.. and use it to break a new record!

Also including Almost none Roguelite Features, Undesigned gameplay, Buggy mechanics, Familiar resources, Noob or useless abilities, Bad translations and other bunch of things.

HAVE A NICE TRIGGER HAPPY DAY THEN!
